description: Command file has no YAML frontmatter block; `name:` field is absent, preventing discoverability in /help and command picker
suggested_fix: Add YAML frontmatter at file top with `name: evaluate-repository`

description: Command file has no YAML frontmatter block; `description:` field is absent, hiding command purpose from users and IDE integrations
suggested_fix: Add `description: Evaluate a repository for inclusion in Awesome Claude Code` to the frontmatter block

description: Command file declares no `allowed-tools:` field; Claude Code cannot enforce tool restrictions during repository evaluation
suggested_fix: Add allowed-tools listing the tools needed (e.g., Read, WebFetch, Bash) to scope execution surface

description: Cursor Rules YAML frontmatter fragments (--- description: Global Rule... globs: *,**/*) embedded at lines 64-73 inside body prose, malformed for both CLAUDE.md and Cursor Rules parsers
suggested_fix: Remove the embedded YAML blocks or relocate them to a separate .cursorrules or .cursor/rules/ file

description: Vague quantifier `appropriate` in: 'Use the logging module with appropriate levels'
suggested_fix: Replace with explicit levels: 'Use DEBUG for trace, INFO for lifecycle events, WARNING for recoverable errors, ERROR for failures'

description: Vague quantifier `appropriately` in: 'Benchmark examples should be placed in appropriately named subdirectories'
suggested_fix: Specify the naming pattern: 'subdirectories named using kebab-case matching the stage prefix, e.g. stage1-idea/'

description: Vague quantifier `relevant` in: 'Identify relevant files in your codebase (using Gemini by default)'
suggested_fix: Describe what makes a file relevant: 'files whose names, imports, or content match the query topic'

description: Vague quantifier `sufficient` in: 'The query must include sufficient information for vibe-tools to determine which server to use'
suggested_fix: Specify required info: 'Include server name or tool capability type in your query (e.g., "using mcp-server-sqlite")'

description: Vague quantifier `appropriate` in: 'Use mock data where appropriate, avoid hitting real APIs in tests'
suggested_fix: Specify when mocks are acceptable: 'Use mock data for unit tests; integration tests must use a real test database'

description: Vague quantifier `appropriate` in: 'Generates appropriate XP rewards and notifications for discoveries'
suggested_fix: Specify exact XP values per discovery category rather than 'appropriate'

description: Vague quantifier `appropriate` in: 'Implement appropriate logging levels (debug, info, error)'
suggested_fix: Remove 'appropriate' — the parenthetical already enumerates valid levels; rewrite as 'Use debug for trace, info for operations, error for failures'

description: Vague quantifier `appropriate` in: 'Use os_log for logging, with appropriate log levels'
suggested_fix: Specify: 'Use .debug for trace, .info for lifecycle, .error for failures, .fault for unrecoverable errors'

description: Vague quantifier `relevant` in: 'Continue previous conversations with relevant historical context'
suggested_fix: Specify what context to include: 'recent notes, linked entities, and observations from the specified timeframe'

description: File references apps/api/CLAUDE.md, apps/web/CLAUDE.md, packages/database/CLAUDE.md, and infra/CLAUDE.md as sub-guides; these were not included in the audit set so their existence in the target repo cannot be confirmed
suggested_fix: Verify all referenced sub-CLAUDE.md files exist; add a CI check to detect broken internal references

description: File cites node_modules/vibe-tools/README.md and vibe-tools.config.json as authoritative documentation; these are runtime artifacts absent from the repository root
suggested_fix: Reference the canonical upstream documentation URL instead of a generated node_modules path
